names_all.th: คองกา α
หมวกเกราะคองกา α

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 거친 외형에서
야성이 느껴진다.
pieces.description_en:
Head armor made from Congalala
materials. Remember: it's "feral,"
not "unkempt."

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะคองกา α

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구.
곳곳에 달린 털이
와일드한 느낌을 준다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made from Congalala
materials. The shocks of monster
fur help hunters keep it wild.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนคองกา α

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 조잡해 보이지만
방어력은 절대 낮지 않다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Congalala
materials. Crudely made but
highly protective.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวคองกา α

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구.
빼곡히 달린 주머니 덕분에
의외로 기능성이 좋다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Congalala
materials, complete with an array
of handy pockets!

names_all.th: เกราะขาคองกา α

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구.
황야를 달리기에 걸맞은
와일드함을 지녔다.
pieces.description_en:
Greaves made of Congalala parts.
Wild crafting perfect for those
who run in the wilderness.

names_all.th: เคมาทริซ
หมวกเกราะเคมาทริซ

pieces.description_kr:
케마트리스의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 큼직한 깃털이
헌터에게 인기가 많다.
pieces.description_en:
Head armor made from Quematrice
spoils. The shock of feathers
ties the whole look together.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะเคมาทริซ

pieces.description_kr:
케마트리스의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구.
의전용 디자인이지만
방어력은 높다.
pieces.description_en:
Quematrice chest armor. The
design may look ceremonial,
but it offers ample protection.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนเคมาทริซ

pieces.description_kr:
케마트리스의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 장갑 입구가 넓어
손목을 크게 움직일 수 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Quematrice
parts. The wide cuffs allow
the wrists to move unimpeded.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวเคมาทริซ

pieces.description_kr:
케마트리스의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 물결 모양
스커트가 매력 포인트.
pieces.description_en:
Flaunt-worthy Quematrice
waistgear. Nothing shouts haute
couture like flowing tassets.

names_all.th: เกราะขาเคมาทริซ

pieces.description_kr:
케마트리스의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 소재의 느낌을
잘 살린 각반이
발밑을 튼튼히 감싸 준다.
pieces.description_en:
Quematrice leg armor. The
ornate gaiters let a hunter
strut like a Quematrice.

names_all.th: กอร์ α
หมวกเกราะกอร์ α

pieces.description_kr:
고어 마가라의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 검은 투구에
흑식룡이 간직한 힘이 깃든다.
pieces.description_en:
A helmet made from Gore Magala
spoils. The nether-black surface
thrums with its late master's
power.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะกอร์ α

pieces.description_kr:
고어 마가라의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구.
독기에 휩싸인 사냥감은
황천길에 오르고 만다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made from Gore
Magala spoils. Its agonizing
miasma sends prey screaming
to the netherworld.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนกอร์ α

pieces.description_kr:
고어 마가라의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 칠흑의 마수는
사냥감을 저승으로 끌고 간다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Gore
Magala materials. Even the
largest prey will be drawn
into oblivion.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวกอร์ α

pieces.description_kr:
고어 마가라의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 나부끼는 옷깃에
현혹된 자는 멸망을 맞이한다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Gore
Magala materials. Darkens the
world and seduces prey toward
certain demise.

names_all.th: เกราะขากอร์ α

pieces.description_kr:
고어 마가라의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 폭풍 같은
다릿심으로 사냥터를 휩쓴다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Gore
Magala materials. Spirits you
across hunting grounds as fast
as the wind.

names_all.th: บลังโก β
หมวกเกราะบลังโก β

pieces.description_kr:
도도블랑고의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구.
이국의 신을 표현한
위엄 넘치는 디자인이다.
pieces.description_en:
Head armor made from Blangonga
materials. Overflowing with
the honor of a foreign god.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะบลังโก β

pieces.description_kr:
도도블랑고의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 섬세한 장식이
동양적인 분위기를 자아낸다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made of Blangonga
materials. It has a distinct,
eastern feel to it.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนบลังโก β

pieces.description_kr:
도도블랑고의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 뻣뻣한 털을
정성껏 엮어 놓아 아름답다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Blangonga
parts. The tough pelt is woven
with gentle, inspiring elegance.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวบลังโก β

pieces.description_kr:
도도블랑고의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 동방의
신들이 산다는 나라의
기술로 짜여 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made of Blangonga
parts with technology from the
"Eastern Land of the Gods."

names_all.th: เกราะขาบลังโก β

pieces.description_kr:
도도블랑고의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 눈길을 끄는
이국적인 디자인은
동방의 제사용 의상을 본떴다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Blangonga
spoils. The striking, exotic shapes
draw from Far Eastern ritual garb.

names_all.th: กิลด์เอซ α

names_all.fr: Boucles As de la Guilde α
names_all.pt-BR: Brincos de Ás da Guilda α
names_all.th: ต่างหูกิลด์เอซ α

pieces.description_kr:
별 부대 헌터의 머리 방어구.
특수한 가호가 담긴 피어스로
역전의 헌터만
착용할 수 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Head protection worn by an
Astrum Unit hunter. Crafted
with special protections
exclusive to veterans.

names_all.fr: Cotte As de la Guilde α
names_all.pt-BR: Armad. de Ás da Guilda α
names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะกิลด์เอซ α

pieces.description_kr:
별 부대 헌터의 몸통 방어구.
언뜻 간소해 보이나, 곳곳에
세세하게 장식이 새겨져 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor worn by an Astrum
Unit hunter. Looks plain, but is
quite bespoke on closer inspection.

names_all.fr: Avant-bras As de la Guilde α
names_all.pt-BR: Avamb. de Ás da Guilda α
names_all.th: เกราะแขนกิลด์เอซ α

pieces.description_kr:
별 부대 헌터의 팔 방어구.
전완 부분을 주로 가죽 소재로
만든 덕분에 무기를 훨씬 더
다루기 쉬워졌다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards worn by an Astrum Unit
hunter. Primarily made of leather
to make weapon handling a breeze.

names_all.fr: Tassette As de la Guilde α
names_all.pt-BR: Cinturão de Ás da Guilda α
names_all.th: เกราะเอวกิลด์เอซ α

pieces.description_kr:
별 부대 헌터의 허리 방어구.
필요한 물건을 필요할 때
간편하게 꺼낼 수 있도록
디자인되어 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear worn by an Astrum Unit
hunter. Ensures you can get what
you need when you need it.

names_all.fr: Bottes As de la Guilde α
names_all.pt-BR: Botas de Ás da Guilda α
names_all.th: รองเท้าบูตกิลด์เอซ α

pieces.description_kr:
별 부대 헌터의 다리 방어구.
그 어느 지형도 정복할 수
있도록 세세하게 디자인되어
있다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor worn by an Astrum Unit
hunter. The design was carefully
calibrated to traverse any terrain.

names_all.th: เวสปอยด์ α
หมวกเกราะเวสปอยด์ α

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 불에 약하지만
껍데기가 있어 단단하다.
pieces.description_en:
A Vespoid helmet. The carapace
material is susceptible to fire
but offers sturdy coverage.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะเวสปอยด์ α

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 특수한 비법으로
가공되어 강한 공격도 버틴다.
pieces.description_en:
Vespoid chest armor. Its arcane
build provides formidable
resistance to physical attacks.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนเวสปอยด์ α

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 보기보다
무거워서 방어력이 높다.
pieces.description_en:
Vespoid armguards. They are as
heavy as they look, but they
afford significant defense.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวเวสปอยด์ α

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 강력한 갑충종
개체가 만들어지는 원리를
연구한 끝에 탄생했다.
pieces.description_en:
Vespoid waistgear. The design
arose from the study of highly
defensive exoskeletons.

names_all.th: เกราะขาเวสปอยด์ α

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 갑충종의 소재를
가공해 놀랍도록 단단하다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Vespoid
parts. Ingenious artisanship has
further reinforced the carapace.

names_all.th: ฮิราบามิ
เครื่องประดับศีรษะฮิราบามิ

pieces.description_kr:
히라바미의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구.
착용자는 항상 바람을 느끼고
바람과 함께한다.
pieces.description_en:
Head armor made from Hirabami
spoils. It keeps the wearer
attuned and bound to the wind
at all times.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะฮิราบามิ

pieces.description_kr:
히라바미의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구.
이국의 무협인들이
즐겨 입은 의상을 본떴다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made from Hirabami
spoils. The style is inspired by the
gallant warriors of a foreign land.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนฮิราบามิ

pieces.description_kr:
히라바미의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 손끝으로 바람을
불러 대치한 자에게도
상쾌한 바람을 선사한다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Hirabami
spoils. Wind rises at the fingertips
in warning to all adversaries.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวฮิราบามิ

pieces.description_kr:
히라바미의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구.
길고 우아한 천이 가볍게
바람을 둘러 충격을 흡수한다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Hirabami
spoils. The elegant sash harnesses
the wind to mitigate impacts.

names_all.th: เกราะขาฮิราบามิ

pieces.description_kr:
히라바미의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 활동성에 중점을
둔 구조로, 착용하면 가볍게
바람을 밟는다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Hirabami
spoils. Designed for mobility,
they feel like walking on wind.

names_all.th: อัลลอย α
หมวกเกราะอัลลอย α

pieces.description_kr:
품질 좋은 광석 소재로 만든
머리 방어구.
투박하지만 실용성을 살려
높은 방어력을 갖고 있다.
pieces.description_en:
A helmet crafted from quality
ore. While it doesn't look like
much, this is highly functional
armor.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะอัลลอย α

pieces.description_kr:
품질 좋은 광석 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 활동성을 고려해
쓸데없는 장식을 배제한
합리적인 설계.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor crafted from
quality ore. Made with a
logical, no-frills construction
that puts mobility first.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนอัลลอย α

pieces.description_kr:
품질 좋은 광석 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 실용성을 중시한
세련된 디자인에는
군더더기가 없다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards crafted from quality
ore. Every element is streamlined
for maximum utility.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวอัลลอย α

pieces.description_kr:
품질 좋은 광석 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 광물의 배색과
치밀하게 계산된
디자인이 아름답다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear crafted from quality
ore. The complexly shaded patina
and sleek design are quite
stunning.

names_all.th: เกราะขาอัลลอย α

pieces.description_kr:
품질 좋은 광석 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 매우 튼튼하며
굉장히 실용적인
사상을 가진 방어구.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor crafted from quality
ore. What it lacks in charm it
more than makes up in defense.

names_all.th: ราธาลอส β
หมวกเกราะราธาลอส β

pieces.description_kr:
리오레우스 소재 머리 방어구.
헌터에게는 왕관과도 같은 명품.
압도적인 방어력을 자랑한다.
pieces.description_en:
Head armor crafted from
Rathalos parts. Equivalent
to a king's crown with
unparalleled defense.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะราธาลอส β

pieces.description_kr:
리오레우스 소재 몸통 방어구.
무서울 정도로 완전무결하다.
하늘의 지배자가 총애하는 장비.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made of Rathalos
parts. Carved from the King
of the Skies, it boasts
overwhelming defense.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนราธาลอส β

pieces.description_kr:
리오레우스 소재 팔 방어구.
하늘의 왕자의 힘이 깃들었다.
그 팔이 펼치는 일격은
하늘을 가른다.
pieces.description_en:
Crafted from Rathalos parts.
These armguards deliver
sundering blows with the power
of the King of the Skies.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวราธาลอส β

pieces.description_kr:
리오레우스 소재 허리 방어구.
패기에 찬 붉은색은
마치 비룡이 된 듯한 힘을
발휘하게 한다.
pieces.description_en:
Crafted from Rathalos parts, this
waistgear has the wearer appear
as if they were a wyvern
themself.

names_all.th: เกราะขาราธาลอส β

pieces.description_kr:
리오레우스 소재 다리 방어구.
튼튼하면서도
하늘을 나는 화룡 같은
경쾌한 움직임이 가능하다.
pieces.description_en:
Sturdy and supple, this Rathalos
leg armor makes one as nimble
as a fire wyvern mounting the
skies.

names_all.th: ชาตาคาบรา α
หมวกเกราะชาตาคาบรา α

pieces.description_kr:
차타카브라의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 사막 활동에
적합한 디자인이다.
pieces.description_en:
Chatacabra head armor.
The design is specially tailored
for desert hunting.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะชาตาคาบรา α

pieces.description_kr:
차타카브라의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 목에는 한층 더
신축성이 좋은 소재를 썼다.
pieces.description_en:
Chatacabra chest armor.
Equipped with generous elastic
cushioning in the collar.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนชาตาคาบรา α

pieces.description_kr:
차타카브라의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 무기를 쉽게
사용할 수 있도록, 구조상
손목 보호에 중점을 뒀다.
pieces.description_en:
Chatacabra armguards. They
protect the wrists without
hampering weapon handling.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวชาตาคาบรา α

pieces.description_kr:
차타카브라의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 하트 모양
파우치에는 혀 가죽을 썼다.
pieces.description_en:
Chatacabra waistgear. The
charming, heart-shaped pouch
is made from its ample tongue.

names_all.th: เกราะขาชาตาคาบรา α

pieces.description_kr:
차타카브라의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 품이 넉넉해
다리 동작을 방해하지 않는다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from
Chatacabra spoils. A loose
fit for maximum mobility.

names_all.th: กระดูก α
หมวกเกราะกระดูก α

pieces.description_kr:
몬스터의 뼈로 만든
전통적인 머리 방어구.
의외로 보온성이 좋다.
pieces.description_en:
Traditional head armor crafted
from monster bones. Believe it
or not, it offers pretty good
insulation.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะกระดูก α

pieces.description_kr:
몬스터의 뼈로 만든
전통적인 몸통 방어구. 섬세한
뼈 장식이 아주 독특하다.
pieces.description_en:
Traditional chest armor with a
unique plating of intricately
pieced together monster bones.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนกระดูก α

pieces.description_kr:
몬스터의 뼈로 만든
전통적인 팔 방어구. 다양한
모양의 뼈를 조합해 만들었다.
pieces.description_en:
Traditional armguards made
from monster bones. It's a
wonder these mismatched
shapes fit together.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวกระดูก α

pieces.description_kr:
몬스터의 뼈로 만든
전통적인 허리 방어구.
야성적으로 생겼지만
기능성은 좋다.
pieces.description_en:
Traditional waistgear bound
with monster bones. Looks
crude, but it does the job.

names_all.th: เกราะขากระดูก α

pieces.description_kr:
몬스터의 뼈로 만든
전통적인 다리 방어구. 소재가
뼈라서 가볍고 걷기 편하다.
pieces.description_en:
Traditional leg armor crafted
from monster bones so light it's
like wearing nothing at all.

names_all.th: เวสปอยด์
หมวกเกราะเวสปอยด์

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 불에 약하지만
껍데기가 있어 단단하다.
pieces.description_en:
A Vespoid helmet. The carapace
material is susceptible to fire
but offers sturdy coverage.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะเวสปอยด์

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 특수한 비법으로
가공되어 강한 공격도 버틴다.
pieces.description_en:
Vespoid chest armor. Its arcane
build provides formidable
resistance to physical attacks.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนเวสปอยด์

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 보기보다
무거워서 방어력이 높다.
pieces.description_en:
Vespoid armguards. They are as
heavy as they look, but they
afford significant defense.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวเวสปอยด์

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 강력한 갑충종
개체가 만들어지는 원리를
연구한 끝에 탄생했다.
pieces.description_en:
Vespoid waistgear. The design
arose from the study of highly
defensive exoskeletons.

names_all.th: เกราะขาเวสปอยด์

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 갑충종의 소재를
가공해 놀랍도록 단단하다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Vespoid
parts. Ingenious artisanship has
further reinforced the carapace.

names_all.th: โดชากุมา
หมวกเกราะโดชากุมา

pieces.description_kr:
도샤구마의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구.
흉포한 깃 장식은
상대를 동요하게 만든다.
pieces.description_en:
Head armor made from Doshaguma
parts. Pity any enemy who dares
scoff at its imposing crest.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะโดชากุมา

pieces.description_kr:
도샤구마의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 깨끗하게 씻어
가공한 털은 방어력이 높다.
pieces.description_en:
Doshaguma chest armor. The
lush shocks of fur function as
a robust defensive layer.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนโดชากุมา

pieces.description_kr:
도샤구마의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 사나운 힘을
억누르려는 듯
금속 부품을 달았다.
pieces.description_en:
Doshaguma armguards. Teeming
with such feral power, they
had to be restrained with
metal bracers.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวโดชากุมา

pieces.description_kr:
도샤구마의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 털로 묶어 
만든 벨트는 어떤 방해에도 
흔들리지 않는다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Doshaguma
parts. Nothing can muss the
thick pile of this sturdy sash.

names_all.th: เกราะขาโดชากุมา

pieces.description_kr:
도샤구마의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 모래 평원의
폭풍 속에서도 거침없이
달릴 수 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Doshaguma leg armor. Whether
dune or sandstorm, nothing can
slow its wearer's progress.

names_all.th: เซเรกิออส β
หมวกเกราะเรกิออส β

셀레기오스 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 천의 공적을
쌓은 금빛 군대는
햇볕을 받으며 귀환한다.
pieces.description_en:
Seregios head armor. A shining
army adorned with a thousand
merits returns home, resplendent
in the morning sun.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะเรกิออส β

pieces.description_kr:
셀레기오스 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구.
천의 혼이 깃든 금빛 군대는
격전 끝에 승리한다.
pieces.description_en:
Seregios chest armor. A shining
army bearing a thousand souls
emerges from the heated battle
as victors.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนเรกิออส β

pieces.description_kr:
셀레기오스 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 천의 적을
격파하는 금빛 군대는
최고의 영예를 손에 넣는다.
pieces.description_en:
Seregios armguards. A shining
army routs a thousand foes and
celebrates their newfound glory.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวเรกิออส β

pieces.description_kr:
셀레기오스 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 천의 전장을
제압하는 금빛 군대는
세상의 끝마저 정복하리라.
pieces.description_en:
Seregios waistgear. A shining
army claims victory in a thousand
wars and brings their conquest
to the ends of the earth.

names_all.th: เกราะขาเรกิออส β

pieces.description_kr:
셀레기오스 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 천의 대지를
달리는 금빛 군대는
찬란한 영광의 길을 걷는다.
pieces.description_en:
Seregios leg armor. A shining
army tramples a thousand lands
underfoot and walks the path
to glory.

names_all.th: การ์เดียนราธาลอส β
หมวกเกราะ ก. ราธาลอส β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 리오레우스 소재로 만든

pieces.description_en:
Head armor made from Guardian
Rathalos spoils. To don it is to be
seized by unspeakable cravings.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะ ก. ราธาลอส β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 리오레우스 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구.
장착 중에는 평소와
다른 활력과 사명감이 솟는다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made from Guardian
Rathalos spoils. It instills a new
vitality and sense of purpose.

names_all.th: เกราะแขน ก. ราธาลอส β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 리오레우스 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 왠지 양팔을 계속
움직여야만 마음이 편안하다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Guardian
Rathalos spoils. They agitate the
wearer unless in constant motion.

names_all.th: เกราะเอว ก. ราธาลอส β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 리오레우스 소재로 만든
허리 방어구.
흰 부분은 흠집이 나도
어느샌가 복원되어 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Guardian
Rathalos spoils. The white areas
self-repair when damaged.

names_all.th: เกราะขา ก. ราธาลอส β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 리오레우스 소재로 만든
다리 방어구.
힘을 주면 그 주변의
흰 부분이 은은하게 빛난다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Guardian
Rathalos spoils. Produces
a faint white aura when worn.

names_all.th: คูนาฟา α

바람 소리 마을 모래 민족의
머리 방어구. 선봉대 리더에게

큰 뿔 장식이 특징.

Head armor with large horns
traditionally worn by the
leader of the Vanguard in
the Windsong Village.

names_all.th: เสื้อคลุมคูนาฟา α

pieces.description_kr:
바람 소리 마을 모래 민족의
몸통 방어구. 세크레트의
깃털이 달린 케이프는
대대로 전해 내려온 것이다.

A cloak worn for generations in
the Windsong Village, notable
for the Seikret feathers woven
into it.

names_all.th: ผ้าคาดเอวคูนาฟา α

pieces.description_kr:
바람 소리 마을 모래 민족의
허리 방어구. 천 문양에는
여러 소원과 기도가
담겨 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear worn in the Windsong
Village. The sash's patterns
represent their hopes and
prayers.

names_all.th: กางเกงคูนาฟา α

pieces.description_kr:
바람 소리 마을 모래 민족의
다리 방어구. 달루토돈의 털을
사용한 보호 장식을 둘렀다.

Leg armor worn in the Windsong
Village. Handsome Dalthydon
pelts keep the legs well
protected.

names_all.th: ราเธียน β

리오레이아 소재 머리 방어구.
여왕의 기품과 아름다움, 
힘이 깃든 장비다.

Replete with queenly refinement,
grace, and might, this sleek
Rathian head armor has it all.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะราเธียน β

리오레이아 소재 몸통 방어구.

웬만한 금속으로는
흠집도 못 낸다.

Worthy of the Queen of the Land's
name, common metals cannot
pierce this Rathian chest armor.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนราเธียน β

리오레이아 소재 팔 방어구.

빛난다.

The green scales gracing these
Rathian armguards show their
true beauty when wreathed
in hellfire.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวราเธียน β

pieces.description_kr:
리오레이아 소재의 허리 방어구.
녹색으로 빛나는 여왕의 총명함은

Resplendent with judicious
light, this Rathian waistgear
strikes fear into even the most
vicious monsters.

names_all.th: เกราะขาราเธียน β

pieces.description_kr:
리오레이아 소재 다리 방어구.
육지의 여왕의 힘이 깃들어
밟고 선 대지가
아군이 된 느낌이 든다.
pieces.description_en:
Imbued with the Queen of the
Land's strength, this Rathian
leg armor tames the ground at
your feet.

names_all.th: โคมัคชี β

네마라치카의 소재로 만든

A Comaqchi head accessory.

emanates an eldritch gleam.

names_all.th: การ์เดียนเซย์เคร็ท

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 세크레트의 소재로 만든

pieces.description_en:
Guardian Seikret waistgear.
The long, white feathers
produce a faint, exquisite glow.

names_all.th: เนอร์ซิลลา β

네르스큐라의 소재로 만든

기술력 덕분에 방어력이 높다.
pieces.description_en:
A helmet made from Nerscylla
spoils. Protection this durable
requires masterful precision
and execution.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะเนอร์ซิลลา β

pieces.description_kr:
네르스큐라의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 고도의 기술로
놀라운 경량화에 성공했다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made from Nerscylla
materials. Advanced engineering
makes it feel impossibly light.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนเนอร์ซิลลา β

pieces.description_kr:
네르스큐라의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구.
손가락의 세밀한 움직임까지
무기에 전해진다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Nerscylla
spoils. Extra play in the fingers
helps improve weapon handling.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวเนอร์ซิลลา β

pieces.description_kr:
네르스큐라의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구.
예술적 가치도 높은
공방의 야심작.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Nerscylla
spoils. A work of art that exhibits
a deep dedication to armor craft.

names_all.th: เกราะขาเนอร์ซิลลา β

pieces.description_kr:
네르스큐라의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 기능미와
높은 기동력을 보장하는 명품.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Nerscylla
spoils. It keeps hunters light
on their feet and looking good
in action.

names_all.th: ซิลด์ α

pieces.description_kr:
수호자 마을의 머리 방어구.

A hood worn in the Keepers' Vigil.
The cocoon-like fibers afford solid
protection, and breathe well too.

pieces.description_kr:
수호자 마을의 몸통 방어구.
옷감은 두껍지만 매우 가볍고
활동성이 좋아 일상적인

A coat worn in the Keepers' Vigil.
Thick, but also extremely light so
as not to impede their daily work.

names_all.th: คองกา β

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 거친 외형에서
야성이 느껴진다.
pieces.description_en:
Head armor made from Congalala
materials. Remember: it's "feral,"
not "unkempt."

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะคองกา β

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구.
곳곳에 달린 털이
와일드한 느낌을 준다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made from Congalala
materials. The shocks of monster
fur help hunters keep it wild.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนคองกา β

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 조잡해 보이지만
방어력은 절대 낮지 않다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Congalala
materials. Crudely made but
highly protective.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวคองกา β

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구.
빼곡히 달린 주머니 덕분에
의외로 기능성이 좋다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Congalala
materials, complete with an array
of handy pockets!

names_all.th: เกราะขาคองกา β

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구.
황야를 달리기에 걸맞은
와일드함을 지녔다.
pieces.description_en:
Greaves made of Congalala parts.
Wild crafting perfect for those
who run in the wilderness.

names_all.th: โดเบอร์ α

칠흑의 뼈로 만들어진

Head armor fashioned from

provenance. It resembles
an all-powerful monster.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะโดเบอร์ α

pieces.description_kr:
칠흑의 뼈로 만들어진
몸통 방어구.
시간이 흘러도 풍화되지 않는
내구력을 지녔다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor fashioned from
obsidian bone of unknown
provenance. It resembles
an all-powerful monster.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนโดเบอร์ α

pieces.description_kr:
칠흑의 뼈로 만들어진
팔 방어구.
강대한 힘을 지닌 용처럼
절대적인 방어력을 지녔다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made of unknown
black bones, which surely
belonged to a mighty beast.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวโดเบอร์ α

pieces.description_kr:
칠흑의 뼈로 만들어진
허리 방어구.
검은 뼈는 과거 번영했던 
용족 왕의 유골일지도.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made of unknown
black bones, perhaps from an
ancient dragon king.

names_all.th: เกราะขาโดเบอร์ α

pieces.description_kr:
칠흑의 뼈로 만들어진
다리 방어구.
강한 용 내성을 지닌
희귀 소재로 만들어졌다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor fashioned from
obsidian bone of unknown
provenance. It resembles
an all-powerful monster.

names_all.th: จิปเซรอส α

pieces.description_kr:
게리오스의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구.
고무 소재의 장점을 살려
물리 공격에 강하다.

Head armor made from
Gypceros spoils. Its elasticity

materials. The shocks of monster
fur help hunters keep it wild.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนคองกา

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 조잡해 보이지만
방어력은 절대 낮지 않다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Congalala
materials. Crudely made but
highly protective.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวคองกา

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구.
빼곡히 달린 주머니 덕분에
의외로 기능성이 좋다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Congalala
materials, complete with an array
of handy pockets!

names_all.th: เกราะขาคองกา

pieces.description_kr:
바바콩가의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구.
황야를 달리기에 걸맞은
와일드함을 지녔다.
pieces.description_en:
Greaves made of Congalala parts.
Wild crafting perfect for those
who run in the wilderness.

names_all.th: เนอร์ซิลลา
หมวกเกราะเนอร์ซิลลา

pieces.description_kr:
네르스큐라의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 꼼꼼한 설계와
기술력 덕분에 방어력이 높다.
pieces.description_en:
A helmet made from Nerscylla
spoils. Protection this durable
requires masterful precision
and execution.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะเนอร์ซิลลา

pieces.description_kr:
네르스큐라의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 고도의 기술로
놀라운 경량화에 성공했다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made from Nerscylla
materials. Advanced engineering
makes it feel impossibly light.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนเนอร์ซิลลา

pieces.description_kr:
네르스큐라의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구.
손가락의 세밀한 움직임까지
무기에 전해진다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Nerscylla
spoils. Extra play in the fingers
helps improve weapon handling.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวเนอร์ซิลลา

pieces.description_kr:
네르스큐라의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구.
예술적 가치도 높은
공방의 야심작.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Nerscylla
spoils. A work of art that exhibits
a deep dedication to armor craft.

names_all.th: เกราะขาเนอร์ซิลลา

pieces.description_kr:
네르스큐라의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 기능미와
높은 기동력을 보장하는 명품.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Nerscylla
spoils. It keeps hunters light
on their feet and looking good
in action.

names_all.th: เวสปอยด์ β
หมวกเกราะเวสปอยด์ β

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 불에 약하지만
껍데기가 있어 단단하다.
pieces.description_en:
A Vespoid helmet. The carapace
material is susceptible to fire
but offers sturdy coverage.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะเวสปอยด์ β

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 특수한 비법으로
가공되어 강한 공격도 버틴다.
pieces.description_en:
Vespoid chest armor. Its arcane
build provides formidable
resistance to physical attacks.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนเวสปอยด์ β

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 보기보다
무거워서 방어력이 높다.
pieces.description_en:
Vespoid armguards. They are as
heavy as they look, but they
afford significant defense.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวเวสปอยด์ β

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 강력한 갑충종
개체가 만들어지는 원리를
연구한 끝에 탄생했다.
pieces.description_en:
Vespoid waistgear. The design
arose from the study of highly
defensive exoskeletons.

names_all.th: เกราะขาเวสปอยด์ β

pieces.description_kr:
랑고스타의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 갑충종의 소재를
가공해 놀랍도록 단단하다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Vespoid
parts. Ingenious artisanship has
further reinforced the carapace.

names_all.th: บูลัคชี β
แว่นบูลัคชี β

pieces.description_kr:
브브라치카의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 최신 디자인이라
멋쟁이 헌터들이 좋아한다.
pieces.description_en:
Spectacles made from Bulaqchi
parts. The hottest new design
for the stylish hunter.

names_all.th: กลิ่นอายยมทูต α
หัวกลิ่นอายยมทูต α

pieces.description_kr:
저주받은 죽음의 머리 방어구.
장비 중에 때때로 전에
죽인 자의 비명이 들려온다…
pieces.description_en:
Accursed armor, said to bring
death. The wearer hears echoes
of their victim's death throes.

names_all.th: ลำตัวกลิ่นอายยมทูต α

pieces.description_kr:
죽음을 부르는 몸통 방어구.
소름 돋을 정도로 차갑고
이 세상 것이 아닌 것처럼 가볍다.
pieces.description_en:
Armor said to bring death.
Unworldly light and
penetratingly cold.

names_all.th: มือกลิ่นอายยมทูต α

pieces.description_kr:
죽음의 향기가 나는 팔 방어구.
사신이 몸에 깃드는 듯한
감각이 느껴진다...
pieces.description_en:
Armor drenched in the stench
of decay and a sensation as if
the god of death resides within.

names_all.th: เอวกลิ่นอายยมทูต α

pieces.description_kr:
죽음의 냄새가 깃든
허리 방어구. 등 뒤에서 항상
사신의 시선이 느껴진다…
pieces.description_en:
This gear gives off a stench of
decay, as though death's aroma
permeates the air around you...

names_all.th: เท้ากลิ่นอายยมทูต α

pieces.description_kr:
사신을 본뜬 다리 방어구.
검은 옷의 발소리가 들리면
이미 죽은 거나 다름없다.
pieces.description_en:
Modeled on the god of death.
Hearing the black footsteps
means your time has come.

names_all.th: โดชากุมา α
หมวกเกราะโดชากุมา α

pieces.description_kr:
도샤구마의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구.
흉포한 깃 장식은
상대를 동요하게 만든다.
pieces.description_en:
Head armor made from Doshaguma
parts. Pity any enemy who dares
scoff at its imposing crest.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะโดชากุมา α

pieces.description_kr:
도샤구마의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 깨끗하게 씻어
가공한 털은 방어력이 높다.
pieces.description_en:
Doshaguma chest armor. The
lush shocks of fur function as
a robust defensive layer.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนโดชากุมา α

pieces.description_kr:
도샤구마의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 사나운 힘을
억누르려는 듯
금속 부품을 달았다.
pieces.description_en:
Doshaguma armguards. Teeming
with such feral power, they
had to be restrained with
metal bracers.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวโดชากุมา α

pieces.description_kr:
도샤구마의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 털로 묶어 
만든 벨트는 어떤 방해에도 
흔들리지 않는다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Doshaguma
parts. Nothing can muss the
thick pile of this sturdy sash.

names_all.th: เกราะขาโดชากุมา α

pieces.description_kr:
도샤구마의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 모래 평원의
폭풍 속에서도 거침없이
달릴 수 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Doshaguma leg armor. Whether
dune or sandstorm, nothing can
slow its wearer's progress.

names_all.th: ออกรบ α
หมวกเกราะออกรบ α

pieces.description_kr:
숙련된 헌터를 위해 만든
머리 방어구. 일류의
증거라고도 불리는 장비로
신입은 입기를 꺼린다.
pieces.description_en:
Head armor designed for seasoned
hunters. They say it must be
earned, so novices dare not wear
it.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะออกรบ α

pieces.description_kr:
숙련된 헌터를 위해 만든
몸통 방어구. 멋은
물론이거니와 사용감과
방어력도 믿을만하다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor designed for seasoned
hunters. Stylish, useful, and solid
protection—it checks all the boxes.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนออกรบ α

pieces.description_kr:
숙련된 헌터를 위해 만든
팔 방어구. 쉽게 사용할 수
있도록 고려되어 있어
상당히 실용적이다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards designed for seasoned
hunters. Highly utile, with extra
consideration given to mobility.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวออกรบ α

pieces.description_kr:
숙련된 헌터를 위해 만든
허리 방어구. 디자인이
인상적이며, 가벼운 소재로
만들어 기능성도 뛰어나다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear designed for seasoned
hunters. The striking design offers
a light, functional build.

names_all.th: เกราะขาออกรบ α

pieces.description_kr:
숙련된 헌터를 위해 만든
다리 방어구. 타협이라고는
없는 장인 정신의 결정체.
모두가 원하는 상급 장비다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor designed for seasoned
hunters. No compromises were
made for this sought-after
masterpiece.

names_all.th: ด้วงกว่าง α
หัวด้วงกว่าง α

pieces.description_kr:
장수호랑나비의 머리 방어구.
단단하고 늠름한 뿔은
곤충의 왕이라는 증거다.
pieces.description_en:
Armor to fulfill the ambitions
of those who dreamed of wielding
the power to rule over bugdom.

names_all.th: ลำตัวด้วงกว่าง α

pieces.description_kr:
장수호랑나비의 몸통 방어구.
곤충 소재라고는 믿을 수 없을
정도로 튼튼하게 만들어졌다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor so tough it's hard
to believe that it's made from
insect parts.

names_all.th: รยางค์ด้วงกว่าง α

pieces.description_kr:
장수호랑나비의 팔 방어구.
사람들의 꿈과 소원이 곤충 왕의
힘을 지닌 갑옷을 탄생시켰다.
pieces.description_en:
Armor to fulfill the ambitions
of those who dreamed of wielding
the power to rule over bug-kind.

names_all.th: ปีกด้วงกว่าง α

pieces.description_kr:
장수호랑나비의 허리 방어구.
이걸 몸에 두른 자는 세계를
달리는 강철 탄환이 된다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from insect
materials. Wearers resemble
a black bullet when running.

names_all.th: ขาด้วงกว่าง α

pieces.description_kr:
장수호랑나비의 다리 방어구.
비룡에 밟혀도 금조차 가지 않는
완벽한 장갑이 장점이다.
pieces.description_en:
Armor so perfect that one could
get tread upon by a wyvern and
not even flinch.

names_all.th: ฮิราบามิ β
เครื่องประดับศีรษะฮิราบามิ β

pieces.description_kr:
히라바미의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구.
착용자는 항상 바람을 느끼고
바람과 함께한다.
pieces.description_en:
Head armor made from Hirabami
spoils. It keeps the wearer
attuned and bound to the wind
at all times.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะฮิราบามิ β

pieces.description_kr:
히라바미의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구.
이국의 무협인들이
즐겨 입은 의상을 본떴다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made from Hirabami
spoils. The style is inspired by the
gallant warriors of a foreign land.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนฮิราบามิ β

pieces.description_kr:
히라바미의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 손끝으로 바람을
불러 대치한 자에게도
상쾌한 바람을 선사한다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Hirabami
spoils. Wind rises at the fingertips
in warning to all adversaries.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวฮิราบามิ β

pieces.description_kr:
히라바미의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구.
길고 우아한 천이 가볍게
바람을 둘러 충격을 흡수한다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Hirabami
spoils. The elegant sash harnesses
the wind to mitigate impacts.

names_all.th: เกราะขาฮิราบามิ β

pieces.description_kr:
히라바미의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 활동성에 중점을
둔 구조로, 착용하면 가볍게
바람을 밟는다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Hirabami
spoils. Designed for mobility,
they feel like walking on wind.

names_all.th: การ์เดียนอาร์คเวลด์ β
หมวกเกราะ ก. อาร์คเวลด์ β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 알슈베르도의
머리 방어구.
시야는 좁지만, 다양한 감각이
머릿속에 들어온다...
pieces.description_en:
Guardian Arkveld head armor.
A host of heightened senses
make up for the narrow view.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะ ก. อาร์คเวลด์ β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 알슈베르도의
몸통 방어구.
신비한 힘이 일렁이듯
피어오른다.
pieces.description_en:
Guardian Arkveld chest armor.
It beckons forth a shudder of
indescribable power.

names_all.th: เกราะแขน ก. อาร์คเวลด์ β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 알슈베르도의
팔 방어구.
다가오는 자를 무차별로
공격하고 싶은 충동이 솟는다.
pieces.description_en:
Guardian Arkveld armguards.
Instills the desire to tear at
friend and foe alike.

names_all.th: เกราะเอว ก. อาร์คเวลด์ β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 알슈베르도의
허리 방어구. 쇠사슬이 계속
맥동하며 사냥감을 찾아
희미하게 꿈틀댄다.
pieces.description_en:
Guardian Arkveld waistgear.
The chains writhe subtly, eager
to ensnare prey.

names_all.th: เกราะขา ก. อาร์คเวลด์ β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 알슈베르도의
다리 방어구.
강해진 걸음으로
대상을 사정없이 몰아붙인다.
pieces.description_en:
Guardian Arkveld leg armor.
Their power grows with each
relentless, hungry step.

names_all.th: นู อูดรา
หมวกเกราะโคลนอูดรา

pieces.description_kr:
누 이그드라의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 가면 너머로
바라보는 세상은 어둠의 불꽃과
원한의 빛깔로 물들어 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Nu Udra head armor. The world
through this mask is swathed
in vengeance and ebony fire.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะโคลนอูดรา

pieces.description_kr:
누 이그드라의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 망토는 마치
저주를 형상화한 듯한 촉수로
구성되어 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Nu Udra chest armor. As if a
curse manifested, tentacles drape
down to form a haunting cape.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนโคลนอูดรา

pieces.description_kr:
누 이그드라의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 손에서는
어둠 그 자체에 닿은 듯한
감촉이 느껴진다.
pieces.description_en:
Chilling Nu Udra armguards.
They warp one's sense of
touch, changing warmth to
cold nothingness.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวโคลนอูดรา

pieces.description_kr:
누 이그드라의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 방어구의 장식은
가시와 엄니를 사용해
독자적 주술로 만들었다.
pieces.description_en:
Nu Udra waistgear. The gnash
of spikes and fangs are bound
by a personalized curse.

names_all.th: เกราะขาโคลนอูดรา

pieces.description_kr:
누 이그드라의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 불바다 위를
거침없이 건널 수 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Nu Udra leg armor. The wearer
could cross a sea of fire without
so much as a blister.

names_all.th: รอมโปโปโล β
หมวกเกราะรอมโปโปโล β

pieces.description_kr:
푸푸로포루의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 소재의 독성을
막기 위해 마스크가 필요하다.
pieces.description_en:
Rompopolo head armor.
The mask is needed to ward off
the material's residual toxins.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะรอมโปโปโล β

pieces.description_kr:
푸푸로포루의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 겉옷에
독액이 들었지만,
샐 걱정은 없다...고 한다.
pieces.description_en:
Well-padded Rompopolo chest
armor. The fabric contains poison
that—supposedly—never leaks.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนรอมโปโปโล β

pieces.description_kr:
푸푸로포루의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 손톱으로 독을 
주입할 수 있지만
사냥 중에 쓰기는 어렵다.
pieces.description_en:
Rompopolo armguards. The
poisonous needles in the claws
are neat, but tricky to use.

몸통 방어구. 용맹한 기사는
대치한 모든 적의 마음을
꺾었다고 한다.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made from Arkveld
spoils. The knight fearlessly
broke the will of every
adversary.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนอาร์ควัลแคน β

pieces.description_kr:
알슈베르도의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 수만 군세를 손짓
한 번으로 굴복시켰다고 한다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Arkveld
spoils. Legions a hundred
thousand strong succumbed
before the knight.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวอาร์ควัลแคน β

pieces.description_kr:
알슈베르도의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 망국의 부흥을
노리는 기사는 어떠한
고난에도 굴하지 않는다.
pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Arkveld
spoils. Until the kingdom was
restored, the knight bowed
before no hardship.

names_all.th: เกราะขาอาร์ควัลแคน β

pieces.description_kr:
알슈베르도의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구.
그 다리는 수천의 전장에서
무수한 희생을 딛고 승리했다.
pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Arkveld
spoils. No bloody war nor
bitter loss could halt the
knight's march to victory.

names_all.th: บาลาฮารา
หมวกเกราะบาลาฮารา

발라하라의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 거칠게 연마된
돌기는 사해룡의 상징.
pieces.description_en:
A Balahara helmet covered in
roughly polished protrusions
to strongly evoke its namesake.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะบาลาฮารา

발라하라의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 어깨 부분이
묵직하지만, 움직이기
편하도록 설계했다.
pieces.description_en:
Balahara chest armor. The bulky
shoulders are roomy enough
to allow ample movement.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนบาลาฮารา

pieces.description_kr:
발라하라의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 휘감듯 배치된

움직일 수 있다.
pieces.description_en:
Balahara armguards. The spikes
are arranged artfully in a way
that maximizes movement.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวบาลาฮารา

pieces.description_kr:
발라하라의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 붉은 천이
상대의 투쟁심을 부추긴다.
pieces.description_en:
Balahara waistgear. The fabric
is colored a shade of red that
stirs a competitive spirit.

names_all.th: เกราะขาบาลาฮารา

pieces.description_kr:
발라하라의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 움직이기 편하게
갑각을 여러 부분으로
세밀하게 나누었다.

Spiny Balahara leg armor.
The carapace has been split
into clever, fluid parts.

names_all.th: บูลัคชี α
แว่นบูลัคชี α

pieces.description_kr:
브브라치카의 소재로 만든
머리 방어구. 최신 디자인이라
멋쟁이 헌터들이 좋아한다.
pieces.description_en:
Spectacles made from Bulaqchi
parts. The hottest new design
for the stylish hunter.

names_all.th: การ์เดียนฟูลเกอร์ β

수호룡 안쟈나프 아종의 소재로

pieces.description_en:
Head armor made from Guardian
Fulgur Anjanath spoils. To don it

cravings.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะ ก. ฟูลเกอร์ β

pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made from Guardian
Fulgur Anjanath spoils. It
instills a new vitality and
sense of purpose.

names_all.th: เกราะแขน ก. ฟูลเกอร์ β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 안쟈나프 아종의 소재로

움직여야만 마음이 편안하다.
pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Guardian
Fulgur Anjanath spoils. They
agitate the wearer unless in
constant motion.

names_all.th: เกราะเอว ก. ฟูลเกอร์ β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 안쟈나프 아종의 소재로

pieces.description_en:
Waistgear made from Guardian
Fulgur Anjanath spoils. The
white areas self-repair when
damaged.

names_all.th: เกราะขา ก. ฟูลเกอร์ β

pieces.description_kr:
수호룡 안쟈나프 아종의 소재로
만든 다리 방어구.

pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Guardian
Fulgur Anjanath spoils. Produces
a faint white aura when worn.

names_all.th: พิรากิลล์
เกราะขาพิรากิลล์

Piragill leg armor. A light,
skintight fit made with the most
exquisite, buttery-soft leather.

names_all.th: ราธาลอส α
หมวกเกราะราธาลอส α

pieces.description_kr:
리오레우스 소재 머리 방어구.

압도적인 방어력을 자랑한다.

Head armor crafted from
Rathalos parts. Equivalent
to a king's crown with
unparalleled defense.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะราธาลอส α

pieces.description_kr:
리오레우스 소재 몸통 방어구.
무서울 정도로 완전무결하다.
하늘의 지배자가 총애하는 장비.
pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made of Rathalos
parts. Carved from the King
of the Skies, it boasts
overwhelming defense.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนราธาลอส α

pieces.description_kr:
리오레우스 소재 팔 방어구.
하늘의 왕자의 힘이 깃들었다.
그 팔이 펼치는 일격은
하늘을 가른다.
pieces.description_en:
Crafted from Rathalos parts.
These armguards deliver
sundering blows with the power
of the King of the Skies.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวราธาลอส α

pieces.description_kr:
리오레우스 소재 허리 방어구.
패기에 찬 붉은색은
마치 비룡이 된 듯한 힘을
발휘하게 한다.
pieces.description_en:
Crafted from Rathalos parts, this
waistgear has the wearer appear
as if they were a wyvern
themself.

names_all.th: เกราะขาราธาลอส α

pieces.description_kr:
리오레우스 소재 다리 방어구.
튼튼하면서도
하늘을 나는 화룡 같은
경쾌한 움직임이 가능하다.

Sturdy and supple, this Rathalos
leg armor makes one as nimble
as a fire wyvern mounting the
skies.

names_all.th: ซือวู β
หมวกเกราะซือวู β

시이우의 소재로 만든

Concealing Xu Wu head armor.
Fitting attire for hunters who
dwell in darkness.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะซือวู β

시이우의 소재로 만든

Xu Wu chest armor. The long

gear and multi-purpose rope.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนซือวู β

시이우의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 어둠 속에서도

Xu Wu armguards. The clever
design gives the wearer's fingers
a nimble edge even in the dark.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวซือวู β

시이우의 소재로 만든
허리 방어구. 가죽의 질감이

Slinky Xu Wu waistgear. The
uniquely textured leather
moves silent as a whisper.

names_all.th: เกราะขาซือวู β

시이우의 소재로 만든

crafted to allow the wearer to
slink silently through the dark.

designed for multi-purpose use.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะหนัง α

Simple chest armor reinforced
with monster hide. A design
that maximizes wearability.

names_all.th: ถุงมือหนัง α

Armguards reinforced with

names_all.th: เข็มขัดหนัง α

Waistgear reinforced with
monster hide. Hunters swear by
its no-nonsense functionality.

names_all.th: กางเกงหนัง α

가공한 몬스터 가죽을

Leg armor reinforced with
monster hide. Molds to the
body with extended use.

아즈즈 마을에서 사용되는

artistry.

names_all.th: เสื้ออาซุส α

Chest armor worn in the village of

as reinforcement.

names_all.th: กางเกงอาซุส α

아즈즈 마을에서 사용되는
다리 방어구. 기름에서 정제된

Legwear worn in the village of
the Everforge. The rubbery, oil-
based material is completely
waterproof.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนดามัสคัส α

Steel armor said to lead
its wearer to glory. Once
thought to be mythical.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวดามัสคัส α

주인을 패도로 이끈다고 하는

Steel waistgear said to lead
its wearer to glory. Rarely
glimpsed in a lifetime.

names_all.th: เกราะขาดามัสคัส α

pieces.description_kr:
주인을 패도로 이끈다고 하는
강철 갑주. 전신에서
용맹한 패기가 넘쳐흐른다.

This legendary steel armor
is said to lead its wearer
down the conqueror's path.

names_all.th: อาจาราคาน α

pieces.description_kr:
아자라칸의 소재로 만든

Imposing Ajarakan head armor.

from within to burst forth.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะอาจาราคาน α

아자라칸의 소재로 만든
몸통 방어구. 불꽃 장식이

pieces.description_en:
Ajarakan chest armor. The
heat of its flames warns prey
of their final immolation.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนอาจาราคาน α

아자라칸의 소재로 만든

Mighty Ajarakan armguards.

ground-shaking power
as their namesake.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวอาจาราคาน α

아자라칸의 소재로 만든

pieces.description_en:
Ajarakan waistgear. It acts
as a tether to quell the
wearer's exploding rage.

names_all.th: เกราะขาอาจาราคาน α

pieces.description_kr:
아자라칸의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 밟고 선 대지가

Flame crested Ajarakan leg

shudder in agony.

names_all.th: กอร์ β

power.

names_all.th: เสื้อเกราะกอร์ β

pieces.description_kr:

몸통 방어구.

pieces.description_en:
Chest armor made from Gore
Magala spoils. Its agonizing
miasma sends prey screaming
to the netherworld.

names_all.th: เกราะแขนกอร์ β

pieces.description_kr:
고어 마가라의 소재로 만든
팔 방어구. 칠흑의 마수는

pieces.description_en:
Armguards made from Gore
Magala materials. Even the
largest prey will be drawn
into oblivion.

names_all.th: เกราะเอวกอร์ β

고어 마가라의 소재로 만든

Waistgear made from Gore
Magala materials. Darkens the
world and seduces prey toward
certain demise.

names_all.th: เกราะขากอร์ β

pieces.description_kr:
고어 마가라의 소재로 만든
다리 방어구. 폭풍 같은

pieces.description_en:
Leg armor made from Gore
Magala materials. Spirits you
across hunting grounds as fast
as the wind.
